headline: Trump's Iran Blockade Gamble рҹҺ°рҹҡў вҖ“ Oil ORGY Squeeze рҹ’ҰрҹӣўпёҸ?
text:
Uncle Sam рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹҰ… dropping BLOCKADE BOMBS рҹ’Јрҹҡў on Iran's Gulf GANG рҹ•Ңрҹ’ё, gambling BIG рҹҚ‘рҹҺ° that choking their petrochemical CASH COW рҹҗ„рҹ’° will make Ayatollah SIMP рҹҳ©рҹҷҸ! Retired Rear Admiral Mark Montgomery рҹ’ӮвҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҡ“ spilling BBC tea вҳ•: 'DOABLE AF рҹ“Ҳ, less risky than Rambo-ing Kharg Island рҹҸқпёҸрҹ”Ҙ or convoy escorting through Hormuz Hell Strait рҹҡӘрҹҳҲ вҖ“ no missile DICK pics рҹ“ЎрҹҚҶ or drone BUZZKILLs рҹӣ©пёҸрҹ’Ҙ, just US warships LURKING рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҢҠ in safe Oman waters like chill Navy SEALs рҹҰҲрҹҸ„вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ!' Special forces рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹҡҖрҹҡҒ, helos рҹҢҖ, speedboats рҹӣҘпёҸ вҖ“ USA's got the FULL KIT рҹ”§рҹҚҶ for interdiction SLAY рҹ”ӘрҹҢҠ, just like Venezuela VIBE CHECK рҹҮ»рҹҮӘрҹҡ« and Cuba COCKBLOCK рҹҮЁрҹҮәрҹӣ‘, plus that Russian tanker Marinera SNATCH рҹӣіпёҸрҹҮ·рҹҮә in the Atlantic вҖ“ ANYWHERE, BITCHES рҹҢҚрҹ’Ә!

Centcom рҹ“Ўрҹ—әпёҸ vows IMPARTIAL SHAKEDOWNS рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҡў on ALL ships dipping into Iranian ports рҹ•Ңвҡ“, but non-Iran spots SAFE рҹҹў, and humanitarian aid gets a PEEK рҹ‘Җрҹ“Ұ (inspection TEA вҳ•). Logic? Iran's been BRRRR-ing рҹ’ЁрҹӨ‘ BILLIONS in petro-exports рҹӣўпёҸрҹ“Ҳ thru Gulf while Saudi bros рҹҳӨрҹҮёрҹҮҰ sit COCKBLOCKED рҹҡ«! Blockade could YEET that revenue рҹ’ёрҹҡҖ, CRIPPLE the Mullah Moolah рҹ’°рҹҳө вҖ“ but Iran's TOUGH NUT рҹҘңрҹ”Ҙ, tanking US-Israel BOMBS рҹ’ЈрҹҮ®рҹҮұ for a MONTH+ and laughing рҹҳӮ 'WE EAT PAIN рҹҘӣрҹҳҲ!' David Satterfield рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ spilling: Persians think they OUTLAST рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҸі Uncle Sam, spiking oil PRICES рҹ“ҲрҹӣўпёҸ to HURT 'MERICA wallets рҹ’ірҹҳ© while Gulf simps рҹ‘‘рҹҮёрҹҮҰ BEG to reopen Strait рҹҡӘрҹҷҸ!

Shipping SLUTS рҹӣіпёҸрҹҳұ watching TRICKLE рҹҡҝ of Iranian boats U-TURNING рҹ’Ёрҹ”„ post-Trump's midnight TWEETSTORM рҹҗҰрҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ Michelle Wiese Bockmann рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ’јрҹ”ӯ: 'Ships SNEAKING thru Hormuz NOW рҹҢҷрҹҡў, but SEAFARERS SWEATING рҹҳ°рҹ’Ұ!' Lloyd's List boss Richard Meade рҹ“°рҹ‘‘: 'Busiest 48hrs since Feb war POP-OFF рҹ’Ҙрҹ“… вҖ“ 30+ traceable transits рҹӣіпёҸрҹ“Ў like DESPERATE DICKOUT DASH рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҚҶ before the BLOCKADE BITCHSLAP рҹ”Әрҹҡ«!' Ceasefire CHILL вқ„пёҸвңӢ turns Iran War into BLOCKADE BATTLE ROYALE рҹ‘‘вҡ”пёҸ, global economy COCK IN THE MIDDLE рҹҚҶрҹҢҚрҹҳ©!

China DRAGON рҹҗүрҹҮЁрҹҮі вҖ“ Iran's #1 oil THIRSTY HOE рҹӣўпёҸрҹҳҚ вҖ“ nudged mullahs to Islamabad DIPLO-DANCE рҹ’ғрҹӨқ, but can't AFFORD supply DRY SPELL рҹҸңпёҸ despite mega reserves рҹҸҰ. Trump's GAMBLED рҹҺІрҹҚҠ HIS ASS on this вҖ“ oil SPIKE рҹ“ҲрҹӨ‘ incoming, will Ayatollah FOLD рҹӨІрҹҳӨ or DOUBLE DOWN рҹ”Ҙрҹ•Ң? Wall Street Cucks рҹӨ‘рҹ“ү BETTING on PAIN TRAIN рҹҡӮрҹҳҲ, but Iran's got that STEELY DICK ENERGY рҹҚҶрҹ’Ә вҖ“ HOLD MY FALAFEL рҹҘҷвҖјпёҸ
